allow: Bash(xargs -I{} sh -c 'echo "=== {} ==="; cat {} | python3 -c "import sys,json; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); r=d.get\(\\"render\\",{}\); print\(d[\\"id\\"], \\"|\\", r.get\(\\"formats\\",[]\), \\"|\\", r.get\(\\"width\\"\),\\"x\\",r.get\(\\"height\\"\)\)"')
Bash(python3 -c "import json,sys; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); print\(f'{len\(d[\\"tools\\"]\)} tools'\); [print\(f'  {t[\\"id\\"]}'\) for t in d[\\"tools\\"]]")

Bash(python3 -c "import json,sys; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); tiers={}; [tiers.update\({a['tier']: tiers.get\(a['tier'],0\)+1}\) for a in d['assets']]; print\(f'{len\(d[\\"assets\\"]\)} assets'\); [print\(f'  {k}: {v}'\) for k,v in tiers.items\(\)]")
Bash(python3 -c "import json,sys; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); [print\(k,':',v\) for k,v in d.get\('dependencies',{}\).items\(\)]")
